instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。
input: 谁是论文《Multi-GPrompt for Multi-Task Pre-Training and Prompting on Graphs》的所有作者？
output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'Multi-GPrompt for Multi-Task Pre-Training and Prompting on Graphs'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN a.name
